valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Fri 26 Jun 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Sat 27 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: New low expected Shannon 1007 by 1800 Friday. Low FitzRoy 1010 losing its identity. High German Bight 1024 dissipating
